basic_details.job_title: HBCH MPMMCC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident in Oral Oncology Reconstructive Surgery
basic_details.short_information: The Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre has officially announced the Senior Resident in Oral Oncology Reconstructive Surgery Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. VAR/ACA/22/2026 on the official website. Candidates up to 40 years of age (with applicable relaxation for reserved categories) and holding an M.D.S. (Maxillofacial Surgery) or an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the Dental Council of India can submit their online applications up to 15-06-2026. Direct links to download

age_limit.age_details: Max: 40 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC & 10 years for Physically Handicapped)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years OBC: 3 years Physically Handicapped: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.D.S. (MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY) OR EQUIVALENT POSTGRADUATE DEGREE RECOGNIZED BY DENTAL COUNCIL OF INDIA
qualification.details: Senior Resident in Oral Oncology Reconstructive Surgery: M.D.S. (MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY) OR EQUIVALENT POSTGRADUATE DEGREE RECOGNIZED BY DENTAL COUNCIL OF INDIA. Experience: 1 year tenure (non-permanent) position.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Resident in Oral Oncology Reconstructive Surgery

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 1,33,623/- per month.

selection_process: MCQ Test (if number of applicants exceeds three times the number of posts) Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HBCH MPMMCC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HBCH MPMMCC Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.D.S. (MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY) OR AN EQUIVALENT POSTGRADUATE DEGREE RECOGNIZED BY THE DENTAL COUNCIL OF INDIA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and Physically Handicapped candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,33,623/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the HBCH MPMMCC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of Tata Memorial Centre, Mumbai. The application link will be available in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, an application fee of Rs. 300/- is applicable for all categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The selection process may include an MCQ Test, followed by an Interview. The MCQ test will be conducted if the number of applicants exceeds three times the number of posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual, with a tenure of 1 year (non-permanent).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for positions in Maharashtra, with the organization being Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre.

faq.question: Q10. Will I receive any age relaxation if I belong to a reserved category?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
